summary: Integrate runtime-control state with the Workbench product control plane.
rationale: This slice wires the DB-first runtime-control store into Workbench sessions, job execution, event projection, maintenance, repair import, privacy erasure, and recruiter-facing API contracts. It intentionally crosses the BFF and supporting storage layers because Workbench is the product entry point for runtime progress and candidate truth.
line_count_rationale: Both files are pre-existing large Workbench surfaces. This PR only adds the runtime-control projection and API assertions needed for the integration slice, while keeping extraction work out of the stacked CI repair.
deletion_targets: artifact-first Workbench progress reconciliation as the only source of product state
runtime candidate truth duplicated outside the canonical runtime-control projection path
manual cleanup paths that leave runtime-control owned rows or local artifacts behind
risks: Workbench APIs must continue reading recruiter-visible progress from compact product rows rather than raw provider or debug payloads.
Repair import and privacy erasure must remain idempotent when runtime-control rows already exist.
This integration must not reintroduce artifact files as the primary Workbench state source.
